violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Observed moist wiping cloth on counter rather than in bucket of sanitizer.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. -Observed cracked floor tiles in food prep area.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Secondary container of poisonous or toxic material was not clearly identified to indicated contents. Observed spray bottle of sanitizer was not labeld.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Observed open bags of food in freezer.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — ---Observed ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. Observed top and sides of refrigerator by fryer was very greasy.
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
